topic: ratio word problems, completing ratio tables

Complete the ratio table to solve the problem.

Your closet has 5 shirts for every 2 sweaters. Your closet has 30 shirts. How many sweaters are in your closet?

\begin{tabular}{|c|c|}
\hline
\textbf{Shirts} & \textbf{Sweaters} \\
\hline
5 & 2 \\
\hline
 & \\
\hline
 & \\
\hline
30 & \\
\hline
\end{tabular}
